For the measurement of isomeric yield ratios, targets
of about 1 mg/cm2 were prepared by vacuum evaporation
of natural silver on 6.8 mg/cm2 aluminum backing.
thick natural silver foils were used.
The target assembly consisted of a number of silver
targets sandwiched between aluminum degrader foils.
Gamma rays emitted by the activated foils
were monitored using a 10% HPGe detector.
